text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I find Hishi Amazon back in the waiting room
after the race. She's completely silent...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What're you talkin' to me like I'm fragile glass for? How do I look to you right now?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Depressed 'cause I lost? Like I'll never bounce
back from this?
choice_data_list: You look like you're ready for the future.
You look like you're ready for the future.
You look like you're not ready to give up.
You look like you're not ready to give up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Depressed 'cause I lost? Like I'll never bounce
back from this?
choice_data_list: You look like you're ready for the future.
You look like you're ready for the future.
You look like you're not ready to give up.
You look like you're not ready to give up.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, you know your stuff. And it's not just that. I
also feel happy...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I had no idea there were so many formidable
racers just waitin' for me to trounce 'em!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I wanna take 'em on and beat 'em all! This is
enough to motivate me to train till the cows come
home, and then some!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's clear what I have to do, and that's getting
even faster!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna get stronger! And once I do, I'm takin'
everyone down!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I can do this, Teach! I'm gonna train lots and grab
that win for sure!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Stop making that sad face! Gettin' all down in the
dumps isn't gonna help things!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've got plenty of energy to pull through! I'll never
give up, no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You'd better not tell me to cool my heels or
anything, 'cause I'm bringing this heat to the next
race!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not about to let things end here! I'm Hishi
Amazon, Queen of the Amazons, and I'm not
goin' anywhere!
